data.content: Implementation review approved. The Queues/default column set no longer inserts the type column, so rows no longer show the constant 'work' value. Regression coverage now asserts getBeatColumns({}) excludes the type column. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree/foolery-6c3e: bun run lint completed with existing warnings only; bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
